title: Administrator Senior
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Administrator Senior''' was the title given to the ruler of the [[Oseon system/Legends|Oseon system]] in the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]], seemingly analogous to the title of [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] elsewhere—with large amounts of power but the ability to be overriden by the ruler of whatever government their system belonged to.

[[Lob Doluff]] was the Administrator Senior as of [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]].

{{Stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Flamewind of Oseon]]''
